---
title: ""
format:
  revealjs:
    chalkboard: true
---

## NRS520
```{=html}
<style type="text/css">

body, td {
   font-size: 14px;
}
</style>

```

<p><a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Schedule/Schedule.html">Schedule/Syllabus</a></p>
<br>

#### Week 1

Lecture material: <a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Week 1/Introduction.html">Introduction</a>, <a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Week 1/Information.html">Information</a>

Files to Download: <a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Week 1/Markdown and R Stuff.Rmd">.Rmd</a>, <a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Week 1/Markdown-and-R-Stuff.html">.html</a>

Readings:
